scripts.build: npm run pre && npm run post
scripts.pre: mkdir -p dist && ncc build src/pre.ts --no-source-map-register -m -o dist/pre && mv dist/pre/index.js dist/pre.js && rmdir dist/pre
scripts.post: mkdir -p dist && ncc build src/post.ts --no-source-map-register -m -o dist/post && mv dist/post/index.js dist/post.js && rmdir dist/post
